channel.title: FreshRaise — Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: FreshRaise 2026-W26: 12 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
FreshRaise Issue 2026-W26

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

12 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

Almetra (ex-Deltia)

heat 90

Trigger: €16.3M Series A led by blisce/ — 25 Jun 2026 [EU-Startups + Tech.eu, 2 sources]

Why now: Berlin manufacturing-intelligence platform raising to build product AND expand into the US — Series A money almost always converts into GTM, marketing and US-launch hiring within 60 days.

Who to contact: VP Marketing / Head of Growth (US launch owner)

Angle: Congrats on the €16M + US push — most Series A teams hit a US go-to-market wall right after the round. Here's a 2-line launch plan that worked for similar industrial-AI teams.

source ↗

HR Duo

heat 88

Trigger: €1.6M led by Puma Growth Partners — 25 Jun 2026 [EU-Startups]

Why now: They explicitly said the round funds a NEW UK sales team — a rare, stated hiring signal. Immediate demand for SDR recruiting, sales tooling and onboarding/enablement.

Who to contact: Head of Sales / Talent Lead

Angle: Saw the raise is funding your UK sales hires — want a vetted SDR shortlist (or an enablement playbook) ready before the team ramps?

source ↗

XCures

heat 82

Trigger: $46M Series B led by Innovius Capital — 24 Jun 2026 [Crunchbase News]

Why now: US AI-for-medical-records company; Series B = aggressive scaling of sales, RevOps, recruiting and infra. Big budget, US-based, buying mode.

Who to contact: VP Sales / Head of RevOps

Angle: Congrats on the $46M B — Series B scaling usually breaks RevOps first. Here's a 1-pager on what to fix before you 3× the team.

source ↗

Compri

heat 80

Trigger: €3.2M seed led by Picus Capital — 24 Jun 2026 [Tech.eu]

Why now: Milan AI-procurement startup; seed just closed → first GTM + engineering hires within 60 days and needs brand, content and outbound built from zero.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congrats on the Picus seed — the first 90 days post-seed make or break GTM. Here's how comparable AI-procurement teams landed their first 10 customers.

source ↗

Kalipso

heat 76

Trigger: $3.2M seed — 25 Jun 2026 [Tech.eu]

Why now: Barcelona regtech/compliance platform. Regtech sells on trust → expect a first marketing hire plus heavy demand for content/SEO and category education.

Who to contact: Co-founder / Head of Marketing

Angle: Congrats on the raise — regtech buyers convert on trust + content. Here's a content angle that's worked for similar compliance tools.

source ↗

Serpier

heat 74

Trigger: €1.4M from True Collective + EIFO — 25 Jun 2026 [Tech.eu]

Why now: Danish AI martech for e-commerce; funded to expand the platform → hiring growth roles and actively needs agencies/partners for distribution.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Growth

Angle: Fellow martech — congrats on the EIFO round. If you're scaling distribution, happy to compare notes on an agency/partner motion.

source ↗

SE3 Labs

heat 70

Trigger: Out of stealth, backed by Lakestar, Seedcamp & EWOR — 26 Jun 2026 [Tech.eu]

Why now: Spatial-AI for autonomous systems just emerged from stealth — the post-stealth window is when they build the first commercial team and lock positioning from zero.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of BD

Angle: Saw SE3 just came out of stealth — the first 30 days post-stealth are the best time to nail positioning. Happy to share a quick teardown.

source ↗

© FreshRaise. For subscriber use only. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
